source_title: Q-FIX All-Suture Anchor Family brochure (shoulder repair portfolio)
text: Redefining peak performance Part of the S+N SHOULDER REPAIR Portfolio Inserter is 2mm below bone surface Radial expanding deployment*6, 9, 13-14 2mm Figure 1 Figure 2 Q-FIX ◊ All-Suture Anchor Family Consistent deployment1-3 • Active deployment against the inserter shaft consistently sets the anchor to at least 140N; contributing to high pull-out performance and low displacement during cyclic loading* 4-10 Figure 1 Market Leading Biomechanics**2, 5, 6, 8, 9, 11, 12 • The Q-FIX All-Suture Anchor Family provides market leading biomechanical performance** 2, 5-6, 8-9, 11-12 • Q-FIX anchors have 360º subcortical radial expansion leading to best-in class anchor fixation***2, 4, 5, 8, 9, 10-12 Figure 2 Versatile Offerings The Q-FIX family offers several options to meet needs across surgical procedures or surgeon preferences. Repair Type Suture Type # of Sutures Q-FIX MINI (1.8mm)**** Knotted #2 Suture Single loaded Q-FIX (1.8mm)**** Knotted #2 Suture Single loaded MINITAPE◊ Q-FIX KNOTLESS (1.8mm)**** Knotless #2 Suture Single loaded MINITAPE◊ Q-FIX (2.8mm) Knotted #2 Suture Double loaded MINITAPE◊ * as demonstrated in benchtop testing ** as compared to competitive all-suture anchors in cyclic and fixation/pull-out benchtop testing *** as compared to competitive devices in fixation/pull-out benchtop testing **** available for use with curved instrumentation Watch • Q-FIX KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchor Suture Shuttling Animation • Q-FIX KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchor Bankart and Remplissage Animation 1. Deploy 3. Shuttle 2. Pass 4. Tension & Suture Lock * as compared to the competitive device in cyclic benchtop testing ** as compared in benchtop testing Q-FIX ◊ KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchor • Designed for controlled tensioning post deployment15 • Suture lock feature allows for best in class soft tissue security* 11 Q-FIX KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchor Q-FIX All-Suture Anchor 1.8 have equivalent suture displacement when subjected to cyclic loading**11 Streamlined suture shuttling11 *as compared to traditional #2 suture MINITAPE ◊ Suture Tape MINITAPE Suture Tape has a low profile 19 and coreless design, which has been shown to offer a lower and more evenly distributed level of pressure* 16 The suture tape is conveniently tapered into #2 sutures for use with existing Smith+Nephew suture manipulation devices 17 Curved Instrumentation The Curved Instrumentation has intuitive visual and tactile cues that facilitate drill guide positioning and anchor placement18 • The crescent-shaped laser mark indicated the orientation of the curvature • The vertical laser mark indicates the trajectory of the drill bit Q-FIX◊ Curved Drill Guide can improve access to challenging shoulder anatomy18 Q-FIX◊ All-Suture Anchor by Technique Bankart Repair Q-FIX with MINITAPE ◊ All-Suture Anchor with Dr. Ryan Simovitch Q-FIX with MINITAPE All-Suture Anchor Bony Bankart Animation Biceps Tenodesis Q-FIX with MINITAPE All-Suture Anchor Subpectoral Biceps Tenodesis with Dr. Ryan Simovitch Q-FIX with MINITAPE All-Suture Anchor Arthroscopic Subpectoral Biceps Tenodesis with Dr. Ryan Simovitch Watch Click to watch Q-FIX All-Suture Anchor techniques and animations Q-FIX KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchor Bankart & Remplissage with Dr. Ian Lo Q-FIX KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchor Bankart & Remplissage Animation Q-FIX ◊ KNOTLESS All-Suture Anchors* Reference #
